features.name: docs-migration-managed-docs
features.summary: Bootstrap docs migration is narrowly scoped, clearly defined, and ready for execution.

features.name: governed-project-memory
features.summary: High user value, no external dependencies, bounded by the no-semantic-store constraint; reuses existing artifact harvest and context-injection machinery.

features.name: configurable-model-routing
features.summary: Opens the previously-welded tier→model table and adds a per-role concrete-model override, both runner-keyed (claude|opencode|codex), so cross-provider operators can route reasoning/coding to the models they actually want while every unconfigured role keeps the built-in Anthropic default. Clear precedence rules and strong back-compat with the shipped tier knob; the runner-identity-at-emit-time fork (one ID vs all) and the union-typed models unmarshal are the larger decisions deferred to plan.

features.name: g2-import-graph-gate
features.summary: Turns the prose G2 layer rule into a checkable per-archetype allow/deny matrix by parsing the import graph; core governance value, well-bounded per-language parsers (go/packages, ts-morph, Python AST). Per-language parser breadth defers to the plan step.

features.name: security-gate
features.summary: Wires secret-scanning and dependency-vuln audit (gitleaks/osv-scanner/govulncheck) into validate; high security value, clear tool integration, configurable scanners scoped at plan.

features.name: spec-traceability-gate
features.summary: Closes spec-vs-acceptance drift by verifying every Gherkin scenario maps to an executed step definition; crisp, mechanically checkable, low external surface.

features.name: custom-gate-sdk
features.summary: Lets teams add bespoke mechanical gates via config/plugin without forking; the pivot from opinionated workflow tool to policy engine — built-in gates become the default profile, not the ceiling. Plugin boundary and config schema are larger-effort decisions deferred to the plan step.

features.name: roadmap-doc-sync
features.summary: Makes roadmap.json the source of truth and generates ROADMAP.md with a drift check; dogfood-validated pain (this roadmap has now drifted twice while hand-synced), tightly scoped.

features.name: centinela-doctor
features.summary: Holistic, dependency-free health check across stale evidence, orphaned worktrees, config and roadmap drift; clear graceful-recovery value extending evidence repair.

features.name: enforcement-profiles
features.summary: Named strictness presets (strict/guided/outcome) decouple how much process is enforced from whether outcomes are verified — the keystone for governing the full model-capability spectrum without users disabling governance at either end. Preset semantics and config precedence detailed at plan.

features.name: model-capability-profiles
features.summary: Maps any configured model — cloud or local — to a declared capability profile that selects its default enforcement profile and routing tier; extends the shipped runner-keyed routing so an Ollama model is as first-class as a frontier model. Profile fields and defaults scoped at plan.

features.name: deterministic-artifact-scaffolds
features.summary: Pre-generated artifact skeletons with explicit fill-in slots plus mechanical fallbacks where content is derivable, so low-capability models satisfy artifact shape by construction and spend their tokens on substance; extends the proven docs CLI-fallback pattern.

features.name: headless-governance
features.summary: Non-interactive parity for every confirmation prompt plus a machine-readable end-of-run verdict packet (gates, verify, evidence index); makes unattended, CI, and fleet execution a first-class consumer of governance instead of a workaround.

features.name: workflow-archetypes
features.summary: First-class hotfix/refactor/spike tracks so diagnosis and bugfix work isn't forced through a feature-shaped plan→docs pipeline; clear, frequently-felt need.

features.name: right-size-docs-step
features.summary: Makes the docs step surface-aware (KB guide for user-facing, one-line changelog for internal), cutting wasted full-docs ceremony on internal work; mirrors the proven ux-ui surface gating.

features.name: governance-telemetry
features.summary: Foundational instrumentation: a local append-only event log of blocks, gate failures, verify rejections, and rework with no external service; unblocks the entire insights/dashboard/calibration line.

features.name: centinela-insights
features.summary: Reports most-triggered blocks, most-failed gates, rework-heavy features, and mean steps-to-green; clear value (evidence over anecdote), bounded once telemetry exists.

features.name: failure-ledger-plan-advisor
features.summary: Feeds recurring gate failures from the ledger into the plan advisor so the next feature is pre-warned; high learning-loop value, builds directly on two existing capabilities.

features.name: capability-calibration
features.summary: Reads per-model telemetry (blocks, gate failures, verify rejections, rework) and reports whether each model is over- or under-governed, recommending an evidence-backed enforcement-profile change; replaces vibes-based strictness with measured reliability.

features.name: audit-baseline-ratchet
features.summary: Whole-repo gate scan with a recorded baseline that ratchets down over time; solves the 'disable the gate because zero is unreachable' failure, enabling legacy adoption.

features.name: precommit-and-pr-gate
features.summary: Runs mechanical gates as a fast pre-commit hook and posts verdicts as PR comments; shifts violation discovery left, clear value once the ratchet exists.

features.name: deep-codebase-analysis
features.summary: centinela analyze produces a machine-readable inventory (languages, framework, build/test, locales, layout, import graph); the foundation every brownfield feature reads from.

features.name: archetype-inference-project-synthesis
features.summary: Infers best-fit archetype and drafts a complete PROJECT.md from the analysis for user confirmation; removes the hand-authoring/guesswork barrier for brownfield adoption.

features.name: spec-reconstruction
features.summary: Generates specs/*.feature and docs/features briefs documenting behavior the system already exhibits; gives spec-first gates an anchor on legacy code. LLM-output acceptance bar refined at plan.

features.name: brownfield-roadmap-generation
features.summary: Generates a roadmap separating already-built capability from net-new gaps so existing work isn't re-planned; clear value, well-sequenced after analysis and spec reconstruction.

features.name: adoption-baseline
features.summary: Records pre-existing violations as an accepted baseline on brownfield init so day-one validate isn't drowned by legacy findings; makes gates usable on mature repos.

features.name: completion-delivery-prompt
features.summary: On feature completion, offers valid delivery options (PR via gh or local merge-steward) based on remote presence and never acts without confirmation; closes the 'completed work stalls' gap.

features.name: delivery-artifact-generation
features.summary: Composes PR description and changelog/release notes from evidence Centinela already holds; consistent, traceable delivery instead of hand-written or skipped.

features.name: team-dashboard
features.summary: Aggregate view across worktrees and contributors — feature/step ownership, gate health, roadmap burn-down; clear value built on telemetry. Visual/output surface scoped at the plan step.

features.name: cost-governance
features.summary: Per-feature/per-step token and model-tier budgets with a soft gate; gives visibility into a runaway agent burning budget on one step. For local models the unit is wall-clock/compute rather than spend. Harness figure-sourcing detailed at plan.

features.name: host-harness-adapters
features.summary: Generalizes harness integration behind an adapter so new harnesses plug in cleanly; clear extensibility value grounded in the two existing integrations.

features.name: codex-support
features.summary: Adds a concrete harness via the adapter contract; well-defined once the adapter abstraction exists, scope bounded by the adapter interface.

features.name: local-harness-support
features.summary: First-class local-model targets (OpenCode+Ollama, generic OpenAI-compatible endpoints) with a concrete acceptance bar: a small local model completes a governed feature end-to-end under the strict profile with scaffolds, gates, and claim verification passing; widens adoption to the segment that needs governance most.

features.name: cross-project-memory
features.summary: Extends governed memory across projects so lessons travel; clear value building on the existing per-project memory design, sharing/scoping boundaries scoped at plan.

features.name: adaptive-skill-synthesis
features.summary: When telemetry shows a workflow isn't running as intended, synthesize/adjust skills so the harness absorbs repeated toil; high self-improvement value, appropriately last given its dependencies. Synthesis mechanics refined at plan.
